title: School of Hospitality | Galgotias University
content: Funded Projects Publication WOS/Scopus Student Publication Patent Published/Granted Centre of Excellence The Hospitality & Tourism industry has been identified as one of the fastest-growing sectors in India, contributing significantly to the economy and serving as the country's largest source of foreign exchange earnings, revenue generation, and employment opportunities. However, despite the industry's remarkable growth, it continues to face a shortage of 30,000 trained manpower every year, as stated in the latest five-year plan document. This trend is projected to continue as international tourist arrivals are expected to grow by approximately three percent annually, resulting in an estimated 200 million jobs generated directly or indirectly by the industry by 2030, according to the World Travel and Tourism Council. At School of Hospitality and Tourism (SOHT), Galgotias University, we are dedicated to providing the best education and training to students in the Hospitality & Tourism industry. We offer a premium infrastructure, a robust and holistic curriculum, practical learning experiences, a conducive environment for learning, and both scholastic and co-scholastic development of learners. Our goal is to groom professionals who can confidently excel in any path they choose. Our Hospitality & Tourism courses are tailored to meet industry-specific norms, and national and multinational organizations alike are recognizing personalized services and customer satisfaction as the key mantras to successful businesses, thereby providing endless opportunities for Hospitality & Tourism graduates in the market. At SOHT, we strive to make hospitality & tourism learning multifarious and integrative by keeping the curriculum abreast of the latest trends and innovations happening in the contemporary industry. We maintain quality issues in the domain of hospitality & tourism education, including all measures of accreditation and evaluation to keep the programs & courses strong and competitive in terms of their objectives, nature, and delivery. Our highly skilled and committed team of faculty members continuously prepares graduates to compete with industry standards regarding their professional skill sets apart from attaining educational prospects. Our school believes in building harmony among students, parents, alumni, entrepreneurs, educators, and industry practitioners in the exchange of work-place skills. Hospitality & Tourism professionals with a multi-faceted skillset have the flexibility and adaptability to excel in a variety of career paths. They are in great demand across the globe in various sectors and industries. Graduates of our programs can pursue careers in operational hotels, motels, restaurants, fast-food companies, hospitality allied industries & projects, service apartments, banquet & conference centres, cafe bars, pubs, casinos, theme parks, discotheques, event management companies, exhibition centres, public relations, IT & finance companies, marketing & business development spheres, airhostess, stewards, cabin crew & ground duty staff at airports, trainers & educators in hospitality and food craft institutes, cruise lines, retailing & consultancy services, catering services at railways, airlines, defence sectors, banks, hospitals & healthcare units, industrial and institutional canteens, spas & Ayurveda centres, clubs (golf, country & yacht), guest houses, inspection bungalows, lodges & resorts, family entertainment centres & multiplexes, business & knowledge process outsourcing companies, corporate houses, travel agencies, tour operating companies, tourism development corporations & associations, leisure, recreation & sports venues, and many more. Program: B.Pharm Association to Advance Collegiate Schools of Business UP Government University Grants Commission All India Council for Technical Education The Bar Council of India Indian Nursing Council National Council for Teacher Education. Pharmacy Council of India The Indian Association of Physiotherapists Association of Indian Universities Galgotias University accredited by NAAC with the A+ Embrace the Opportunities of Our Dynamic Sports and Extracurricular Scene Take your Game to the Next Level with our Top-Notch Sports Infrastructure Vishal Gautam 2013- 16Hello everyone, Myself Vishal Gautam a proud alumnus of School of Hospitality and Tourism, Galgotias University. I had started my career with Hotel Radisson Blu Plaza , Delhi and currently working as a Night Operation Manager at Park Inn by Radisson, Northampton, United Kingdom. I would to express my sincere gratitude to all my faculties whose hard work on me helped me a lot to grow in my life. Thank you. Sushil Kumar Motla 2013- 2016Hello Students of Galgotias University, myself Sushil Kumar Motla from 2013-16 batch would like to mention that School of Hospitality and Tourism have changed my entire life with his kind support. I started my career with Hotel Radisson Blu MBD, Noida and currently working as a Restaurant Supervisor in Paul Restaurant (French cuisine) with Azadea Group Dubai (UAE). Thank you to all my seniors and teachers for their continuous support and guidance. Paritosh Kumar Panday 2017-20Hello friends, myself Paritosh Panday passed out in 2020 from School of Hospitality and Tourism, Galgotias University. After completing my course I had opened my own restaurant named Café Downtown at Pilibhit in Bareilly, U.P. I would like give my gratitude to all my faculty members for their outstanding support and their continuous guidance. Nisha 2018-21Hello everyone, myself Nisha from School of Hospitality and Tourism, Galgotias University, batch 2018-21. I would like to thank all my faculty members specially Dean Prof. (Dr.) Rajiv Misha sir and Assoc. Prof. Rohit Jaswal sir, whose continuous guidance even after the completion of course is highly appreciated. I stated my career with Crown Plaza Greater Noida and from there I moved to Maldives as Food and Beverage Service coordinator and soon will be moving to Scotland for another assignment. Thank you once again. Ketan Sinha 2015-18Good evening, everyone! My name is Ketan Sinha a proud alumnus from batch 2015-18 of School of Hospitality and Tourism. I started my career with IHG hotels and selected in their management course named “I Host”. Currently working as Chef De Party with Hotel Crown Plaza, Delhi. I like to thank to all my faculty members for their extra ordinary efforts and endless guidance for the support of career building. It’s because of them only that I am rising day by day. Thank you Galgotias University. Habiba Khan 2015-18Hey, I am Habiba Khan passed out in 2018 from SOHT, Galaotias University. I got placed in Indigo airlines as a cabin crew and currently working as supervisor in Qatar airlines. I am always be thank full to my faculty members who always supported to me grow as a professional.
